Ivan Weinberg, Esq. (415.461.9666; ivan@weinberg-hoffman.com) of Weinberg Hoffman, LLP for Petitioner.
Carolyne Evans, Esq. (415.510.3448; carolyne.evans@doj.ca.gov) Deputy Attorney General for Respondent.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER EDDIE CHEUNG's Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Petition For Writ is taken under submission.

Atty. IVAN WEINBERG, Esq. of Weinberg Hoffman, LLP (Tel: 415-461-9666) for petitioner Eddie Cheung, M.D.;
Atty. CAROLYNE EVANS, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 415-510-3448) for respondent Medical Board of California.
